content_body: A Rolling River Cabin was amazingly beautiful! We had a group of 8 (4 couples), and everyone was taken care of perfectly. We all had everything we needed. Anytime we need a cabin, I will definitely rent this property.  On our trip, we were able to whitewater raft (which was only about 20 minutes from the cabin), and it was an amazing experience. I wish we could have stayed longer than just a weekend, but of course work calls!
title: Amazingly Beautiful
